title: Network Analysis: Web Shell
description: Full packet capture triage of a compromised web server: isolating the web shell upload, tracing the attacker's follow-on commands, and rebuilding the timeline from raw PCAP.

title: Golden Ticket: Detecting Kerberos Forgery in Active Directory
description: How a forged TGT slips past casual log review, and the specific Event IDs and ticket-lifetime anomalies that expose it.

title: Triaging a Ransomware Host Under Time Pressure
description: A first-72-hours playbook for a single infected endpoint: volatile evidence first, encryption scope second, root cause last.

title: Unpacking a Loader: Static and Dynamic Notes
description: Working through a packed loader sample with a static-first pass in a disassembler, then confirming behavior in a controlled sandbox run.

title: IDOR to Account Takeover in a Booking Flow
description: Chaining a predictable object reference with a weak session check to move from a low-privilege test account to full account control.

title: Building a SOC Alert Triage Checklist That Actually Gets Used
description: Notes from turning a sprawling SOP into a one-screen checklist, and what stayed out of it on purpose.
